# Release notes template

AGENT INSTRUCTIONS
- Use for: version bumps, build nights, "what shipped on master" summaries.
- Append to willow-2.0/CHANGELOG.md under [Unreleased] or new [X.Y.Z] - YYYY-MM-DD section.
- Keep user-facing; link ADRs and dev logs for operators.
- Match existing CHANGELOG style if present; otherwise use Keep a Changelog sections.
- MarkdownAI: this is a FRAGMENT pasted into CHANGELOG.md — do not add @markdownai to CHANGELOG itself.
